rows.label: qev090601_MSG0001
rows.name: A word of caution about this mission...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090601_MSG0002
rows.name:
The indigen you'll be hunting is extremely
dangerous. It's already injured several Pathfinder.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090601_MSG0003
rows.name:
Yes, I heard Saiden and
Mondo were among them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090601_MSG0004
rows.name:
All the more reason to do our job
as Avalanche and end this threat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090601_MSG0005
rows.name: That's my sensei![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090601_MSG0006
rows.name:
Damned straight. Er, but what
are you doing here, son?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090601_MSG0007
rows.name:
Licking my wounds after getting
pummeled by that same beast, Sensei.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090601_JNK0010
rows.name: Chastise

rows.label: qev090601_SEL0011
rows.name: Shout at Reggie for running away yet again.

rows.label: qev090601_JNK0020
rows.name: Comfort

rows.label: qev090601_SEL0021
rows.name: Tell Reggie to keep his chin up.

rows.label: qev090601_MSG0008
rows.name:
Eeek! You're starting to
sound just like Sensei![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090601_MSG0009
rows.name:
I guess it makes sense, considering
all the time you've spent together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090601_MSG0010
rows.name:
That wasn't a half-bad shout, friend! Next time,
trying taking a deep breath first, then...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090601_MSG0011
rows.name: KAAAAAAAAAAATSU![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090601_MSG0012
rows.name: ...Keep training. You'll get it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090601_MSG0013
rows.name:
That's mighty kind of you. I wish the
people on my team felt that way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090601_MSG0014_m
rows.name:
Full of mercy as usual. You're on
the path of the Buddha, friend.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090601_MSG0014_f
rows.name:
Full of mercy as usual. You're on
the path of the Buddha, friend.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090601_MSG0015
rows.name:
Now, tell us about this
creature. How did the fight go?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090601_MSG0016
rows.name: It wiped us out in one blow![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090601_MSG0017
rows.name:
Not to brag, but I've been around the
block once or twice as a Collepedian.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090601_MSG0018
rows.name:
But I swear I've never seen anything
like it. That thing is a monster![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090601_MSG0019
rows.name: Then we've got something to look forward to.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090601_MSG0020
rows.name:
We've been fighting nothing but
xenos lately, and I'm sick of it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090601_MSG0021
rows.name:
A classic test of strength sounds
perfect. Man against beast![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090601_MSG0022
rows.name:
I'll forward the coordinates where
we fought it to your comm device.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090601_MSG0023
rows.name: I know you can handle anything, Sensei...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090601_MSG0024
rows.name:
But this thing has sent several Avalanche
straight to the maintenance center.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090601_MSG0025
rows.name: Please be careful.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090601_MSG0026
rows.name: Worry not. We'll have you avenged in no time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090601_MSG0027
rows.name:
Let's send this beast to
Nirvana, friend. We ride! [ST:wait ]
